pages.text: When enabled, librarian villagers sell an $(#7A2FBF)enchanted book with a random tradeable enchantment$() each time you purchase it - not a fixed book for the rest of the villager's life.$(br2)The trade still costs emeralds plus a plain book, and respects vanilla librarian tier pricing.

$(bold)Trade tiers$()$(br)$(li)Novice: 15 emeralds, 1 use$(li)Apprentice: 18 emeralds, 1 use$(li)Journeyman: 20 emeralds, 2 uses$(li)Expert: 24 emeralds, 3 uses$(br2)$(italic)Off by default.$() Enable the $(#7A2FBF)Randomized Librarians$() datapack. Works well with $(l:penchant:modules/loot_rework)Loot Rework$(/l) so villagers stay a source of discovery rather than a checklist.
